info.title: Integrated Intel
info.state.read_only: Active combat: the panel is browse-only and maintenance actions are locked.
info.state.editable: Intermission: repairs, upgrades, and tactical review are available.
info.state.complete: Combat is complete. You can review this run's current status.
info.state.inactive: No combat intel is available right now.
info.maintenance.actions_locked: Opening the panel pauses the battlefield, but repair and upgrade actions stay read-only during an active wave.
info.maintenance.actions_available: During intermission you can repair, upgrade, and choose when to launch the next wave.
